{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":314065,"duration_api_ms":314959,"ttft_ms":2945,"num_turns":39,"result":"CP00-460 review complete — verdict **PASS_WITH_FINDINGS**, no blockers.

The pack is a clean continuation of the CP453–459 descriptor-only analytics-core ledger pattern, extended to risk-class C / 150 units, closing RP15.P03 and opening the RP15.P04 UI foundation. Everything reconciles:

- **Baseline consistency**: binding, live plan, contract `current_pack`, and persisted descriptor all agree (risk C, 150 units, `RP15.P03.M06.S07`→`RP15.P04.M05.S07`, upstream CP459, next CP461).
- **Distributions**: deliverable / micro-title / phase counts each sum to 150 and match the registry requirements.
- **Boundaries hold**: `production_ready:false` (pending post-review closeout), no `writes_product_state`/`loads_real_fixture_data`/`exposes_raw_payload`/`runtime_execution`/`promotes_claude_to_final_approval` set true anywhere; Claude stays read-only and non-final-approver; Hermes is evidence-shape-only.
- **Hardening**: auth preflight passed, 1445-byte stdout, valid JSON, Read/Grep/Glob only, summary-only correctly prohibited and unused.

Two **P3** informational notes only (both by-design, non-blocking): the cumulative no-write attestation carrying a CP453-origin label, and `index.js` appearing as an active ref while unmodified because exports flow through its wildcard re-export. **Human final approval remains required** for the enterprise trust claim — Claude is not the final approver.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"488f15cc-c32f-4756-9389-d4cbcf0868a8","total_cost_usd":2.2544527499999996,"usage":{"input_tokens":46,"cache_creation_input_tokens":119705,"cache_read_input_tokens":1810797,"output_tokens":23976,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":119705,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":550,"cache_read_input_tokens":124301,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3799,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3799},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1168,"outputTokens":20,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.001268,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":46,"outputTokens":23976,"cacheReadInputTokens":1810797,"cacheCreationInputTokens":119705,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.25318475,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-460 is a descriptor-only, risk-class-C, 150-unit analytics-core pack that closes RP15.P03 (M06 tail through M10) and opens the RP15.P04 UI foundation (M00 through M05 head). Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level claim is supported and all boundaries hold.

Consistency: pack baseline (risk C, 150 units, RP15.P03.M06.S07->RP15.P04.M05.S07, upstream CP00-459, next CP00-461) agrees across the prompt, review-baseline.json, registry binding (packages/analytics/src/registry.js:120), the live plan (docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:409), contract current_pack (contracts/analytics-core-contract.json:16) and the persisted descriptor pack_binding (contracts/analytics-core-contract.json:8678). Deliverable distribution {contract:15, implementation:48, test:12, hermes_evidence:6, claude_review:12, security_audit:12, ui:42, fixture:3}=150, micro-title distribution=150, and phase_counts RP15.P03:65 + RP15.P04:85=150 all reconcile to the registry requirements (registry.js:856-939).

Implementation/tests/validation: all 7 required public exports are defined (service.js:978,1011; validators.js:1348,1383,1439,1460,1483) and re-exported via the index.js wildcard. validateAnalyticsCoreCp460P03CloseoutP04FoundationDescriptor enforces descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false per row (validators.js:1409-1412). The contract validator deep-equals the persisted descriptor, cp460_requirements and cp460_no_write_attestation against the generated artifacts and asserts authority boundaries (scripts/validate-rp15-analytics-core-contract.mjs:456-470). model.test.js adds three CP00-460 tests covering coverage, descriptor-only rows and authority boundaries (lines 513-571). command-evidence.json records node --check / node --test / rp15:analytics-core:validate / npm test / npm run validate / build all at exit 0.

Boundaries: production_ready is correctly false with status implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout; production_ready_candidate=true exists only at the Hermes evidence-packet level. No occurrence of writes_product_state:true, loads_real_fixture_data:true, exposes_raw_payload:true, runtime_execution:true or promotes_claude_to_final_approval:true anywhere in the contract. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and non-final-approver (descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false; attestation promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false). Hermes control-plane usage is limited to deterministic descriptor/evidence shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false); no product runtime is opened. Review hardening preflight passed (auth ok, 1445-byte stdout, valid JSON, no errors/warnings; tools Read/Grep/Glob; forbidden_tools_present=false; summary-only prohibited and not used). Unrelated dirty/untracked files in changed-file-scope.json are correctly excluded from pack scope.

Only two P3 by-design informational notes; no P0/P1/P2. Human final approval remains required for the enterprise trust claim.","findings":[{"id":"CP00-460-P3-01","severity":"P3","title":"Cumulative no-write attestation carries CP453-origin descriptor label into CP00-460","file":"contracts/analytics-core-contract.json","line":1721,"details":"cp460_no_write_attestation (and the top-level no_write_attestation at line 1747) include validates_scope_contract_foundation_descriptor_only:true, a label originating from CP00-453, because each pack's attestation is built by spreading the prior pack's via registry.js:850-854 back to the CP453 base (registry.js:151-153). For a P03->P04 closeout/foundation pack the literal 'scope_contract_foundation' wording is cosmetically imprecise, though the cumulative stage flags (e.g. validates_p03_closeout_p04_foundation_descriptor_only:true at line 1745) are present and the whole object is deep-equal validated against the registry constant by scripts/validate-rp15-analytics-core-contract.mjs:462.","recommendation":"No action required for closeout. Optionally, future packs could drop or rename the inherited CP453-specific label to reduce cosmetic ambiguity, but doing so now would only churn an intentionally cumulative, machine-validated attestation.","post_review_disposition":"accepted_by_design_no_action"},{"id":"CP00-460-P3-02","severity":"P3","title":"index.js listed as active implementation ref but unmodified (exports flow via wildcard)","file":"packages/analytics/src/index.js","line":1,"details":"changed-file-scope.json lists packages/analytics/src/index.js among active_pack_implementation_refs, yet git status shows it unmodified. Verified this is correct: index.js re-exports via 'export * from "./registry.js" / ./service.js / ./validators.js', so the seven new CP00-460 exports (required_public_exports in registry.js:927-935) are surfaced automatically without an edit. All seven were confirmed present (service.js:978,1011; validators.js:1348,1383,1439,1460,1483).","recommendation":"No action required.
